name: Eric Hecker
summary: Former contractor who publicly alleged that South Pole facilities possessed advanced directed-energy and communications capabilities.

relationships.context: Long-form public interview expanding his South Pole allegations
South Pole assignment that became the basis of his later public claims
Presented his South Pole allegations publicly at the National Press Club

profileStatus: Former contractor and South Pole technology claimant
profileSummary: Former contractor who publicly alleged that South Pole facilities possessed advanced directed-energy and communications capabilities.
background: Former U.S. Navy servicemember and former Raytheon contractor, according to public interviews.
inclusionNote: Included because he is a prominent modern disclosure personality with a documented interview record. His central South Pole claims are strongly disputed by scientists and fact-checkers.

primarySourceLinks.label: Scientific fact check of IceCube claims
